svg.title: About — Akshay Chavan
svg.text: End-to-end ownership from design to production at Amazon scale
Led cross-functional initiatives solo amid significant team attrition
4 production side projects spanning AI, security, and fintech
From DB schema to infra to API contract — owns the full picture
Building LLM-native products before it became mainstream
Hackathon winner · open-source contributor · fast ship cycles
